center.name: 三宝颜
center.summary: 三宝颜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-billed hanging parrot，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Like the Philippine hanging parrot, it is often caught for the illegal wildlife trade, with escapees recorded outside of its range in Zamboanga City

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Like the Philippine hanging parrot, it is often caught for the illegal wildlife trade, with escapees recorded outside of its range in Zamboanga City
